headline: Seaport Research Keeps $185 Target on Nucor (NUE), Flags Improving Profitability
summary: Nucor Corporation (NYSE:NUE) is included among the Dividend Kings and Aristocrats List: 32 Biggest Stocks. On March 20, Seaport Research reiterated its Buy rating on Nucor Corporation (NYSE:NUE). It maintained a $185 price target after the company’s Q1 pre-announcement. The analyst said the guidance is broadly in line with management’s earlier comments. Profitability is expected […]
